class.help: Registra los datos de las personas reclutadas
class.label: Reclutado
class.name: RECLUTADO

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_reclutado as oi_reclutado, t0.c_estado as c_estado, t0.f_estado as f_estado, t0.n_merito as n_merito, t0.l_visto as l_visto, SEC.policy, SDP01_CV.c_cv as CODE, SDP01_CV.d_ape_y_nom as TEXT, t0.oi_aviso as oi_aviso, t0.oi_cv as oi_cv FROM SDP14_RECLUTADOS as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.Reclutados.RECLUTADO\') as SEC, SDP01_CV JOIN t0.oi_reclutado LEFT OUTER SEC.id , t0.oi_cv LEFT OUTER SDP01_CV.oi_cv ORDER BY oi_reclutado asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_reclutado as oi_reclutado, SEC.policy FROM SDP14_RECLUTADOS as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.Reclutados.RECLUTADO\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_reclutado LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_reclutado asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.Reclutados.RECLUTADO.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.Reclutados.RECLUTADO.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SDP14_RECLUTADOS.oi_reclutado) as CNT from SDP14_RECLUTADOS, SDP01_CV join SDP14_RECLUTADOS.OI_CV inner SDP01_CV.OI_CV Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SDP14_RECLUTADOS.oi_reclutado={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SDP01_CV.d_ape_y_nom,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SDP01_CV.c_cv,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and SDP14_RECLUTADOS.oi_aviso={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

method.description: Inicia el proceso de Reclutamiento de personal para un aviso.
method.label: Reclutar
method.name: Reclutar

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT REC.oi_reclutado, ENTREV.oi_entrevista, ENTREV.f_entrevista, ENTREV.d_entrevistador, ENTREV.n_valor, ENTREV.t_comentario FROM SDP14_RECLUTADOS AS REC, SDP14_RECLUTA_ENTREV AS ENTREV JOIN REC.oi_reclutado INNER ENTREV.oi_reclutado WHERE isnull(ENTREV.f_entrevista)
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT SDP05_AVISOS.oi_aviso FROM SDP05_AVISOS, SDP01_POSTU_CV, SDP01_CV JOIN SDP05_AVISOS.oi_aviso INNER SDP01_POSTU_CV.oi_aviso , SDP01_POSTU_CV.oi_cv INNER SDP01_CV.oi_cv WHERE SDP01_CV.oi_cv = {#SOURCE:@oi_cv} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT SDP05_AVISOS.oi_aviso FROM SDP05_AVISOS, SDP01_POSTU_CV, SDP01_CV JOIN SDP05_AVISOS.oi_aviso INNER SDP01_POSTU_CV.oi_aviso , SDP01_POSTU_CV.oi_cv INNER SDP01_CV.oi_cv WHERE SDP01_CV.oi_cv = {#SOURCE:@oi_cv} and isnotnull(SDP01_CV.oi_personal) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT SDP05_AVISOS.oi_aviso FROM SDP05_AVISOS, SDP01_POSTU_CV, SDP01_CV JOIN SDP05_AVISOS.oi_aviso INNER SDP01_POSTU_CV.oi_aviso , SDP01_POSTU_CV.oi_cv INNER SDP01_CV.oi_cv WHERE SDP01_CV.oi_cv = {#SOURCE:@oi_cv} and isnotnull(SDP01_CV.oi_personal) ')/ROWS/ROW

resource.declare: <DATOS d_empresaExp="asdasd" oi_area_exp="10" oi_area="10" oi_sit_laboral="2" oi_tipo_jor_lab="2" f_hastaact="20200522" f_desdeact="20180930" d_localidad="Rosario" oi_provincia="21" oi_estado_civil="3" c_sexo="M" edad_hasta="25" edad_desde="10" l_incluir_post="1" oi_aviso="3" gaviso="" grecluta="" l_incluir_inactivos="" remun_desde="" remun_hasta="" h_edad_desde="" h_edad_hasta="" c_tipo_aviso="I"><ROWS nmd-col="1"><ROW n_merito="100" id="1" /><ROW n_merito="100" id="2" /><ROW n_merito="100" id="3" /><ROW n_merito="100" id="4" /><ROW n_merito="100" id="5" /></ROWS></DATOS>
resource.description: Retorna los candidatos a un Reclutamiento
resource.name: QRY_Candidatos

qry:select.name: qryMain

resource.description: Codigo de la clase de reclutamiento
resource.name: TEMPL_ReclutamientoCode

resource.description: Firma de un metodo de merito de la clase de reclutamiento
resource.name: TEMPL_MetodoRec

resource.description: Llamada a un metodo de merito de la clase de reclutamiento
resource.name: TEMPL_LlamadaMetodoRec

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT REC.oi_reclutado, REC.oi_cv, REC.n_merito FROM SDP14_RECLUTADOS AS REC WHERE REC.oi_aviso = {#SOURCE:@poi_aviso} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT REC.n_merito FROM SDP14_RECLUTADOS AS REC WHERE REC.oi_aviso = {#SOURCE:@poi_aviso} and REC.oi_cv = {#SOURCE:@id}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_ESCRIBE
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG24_NIV_IDIOMA.oi_nivel_idioma FROM ORG24_NIV_IDIOMA WHERE ORG24_NIV_IDIOMA.c_nivel_equiv = {#SOURCE:@c_nivel_escribe} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_HABLA
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG24_NIV_IDIOMA.oi_nivel_idioma FROM ORG24_NIV_IDIOMA WHERE ORG24_NIV_IDIOMA.c_nivel_equiv = {#SOURCE:@c_nivel_habla} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_LEE
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG24_NIV_IDIOMA.oi_nivel_idioma FROM ORG24_NIV_IDIOMA WHERE ORG24_NIV_IDIOMA.c_nivel_equiv = {#SOURCE:@c_nivel_lee} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT AVI.oi_aviso, AVI.d_puesto FROM SDP05_AVISOS as AVI WHERE AVI.c_estado = \'P\' AND AVI.oi_aviso = {#SOURCE:@poi_aviso} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.Reclutados.RECLUTA_ENTREV.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.Reclutados.RECLUTA_ENTREV.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SDP14_RECLUTA_ENTREV.oi_recluta_entrev) as CNT from SDP14_RECLUTA_ENTREV, SDP13_ENTREVISTAS join SDP14_RECLUTA_ENTREV.OI_ENTREVISTA inner SDP13_ENTREVISTAS.OI_ENTREVISTA Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SDP14_RECLUTA_ENTREV.oi_recluta_entrev={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SDP13_ENTREVISTAS.d_entrevista,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SDP13_ENTREVISTAS.c_entrevista,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and SDP14_RECLUTA_ENTREV.oi_reclutado={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

assosiation.description: Registra los factores de los exámenes que se realizan a los reclutados
assosiation.label: Factores de Exámenes del Reclutado
assosiation.name: FACT_EXA_REC

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.Reclutados.RECLUTA_EXA.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.Reclutados.RECLUTA_EXA.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SDP14_RECLUTA_EXA.oi_recluta_exa) as CNT from SDP14_RECLUTA_EXA, SDP12_EXAMENES join SDP14_RECLUTA_EXA.OI_EXAMEN inner SDP12_EXAMENES.OI_EXAMEN Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SDP14_RECLUTA_EXA.oi_recluta_exa={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SDP12_EXAMENES.d_examen,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SDP12_EXAMENES.c_examen,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and SDP14_RECLUTA_EXA.oi_reclutado={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

class.help: Registra los factores de los exámenes que se realizan a los reclutados
class.label: Factor Exámen Reclutado
class.name: FAC_EXA_REC

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.Reclutados.FAC_EXA_REC.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.Reclutados.FAC_EXA_REC.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SDP14_FACT_EXA_REC.oi_fac_exa_rec) as CNT from SDP14_FACT_EXA_REC, SDP12_FACTORES join SDP14_FACT_EXA_REC.OI_FACTOR_EXAMEN inner SDP12_FACTORES.OI_FACTOR_EXAMEN Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SDP14_FACT_EXA_REC.oi_fac_exa_rec={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SDP12_FACTORES.d_factor_examen,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SDP12_FACTORES.c_factor_examen,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and SDP14_FACT_EXA_REC.oi_recluta_exa={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.Reclutados.RECLUTA_INF.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.Reclutados.RECLUTA_INF.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SDP14_RECLUTA_INF.oi_recluta_inf) as CNT from SDP14_RECLUTA_INF, SDP22_INFORMES join SDP14_RECLUTA_INF.OI_INFORME inner SDP22_INFORMES.OI_INFORME Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SDP14_RECLUTA_INF.oi_recluta_inf={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SDP22_INFORMES.d_informe,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SDP22_INFORMES.c_informe,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and SDP14_RECLUTA_INF.oi_reclutado={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.Reclutados.RECLUTA_REF.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.Reclutados.RECLUTA_REF.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SDP14_RECLUTA_REF.oi_recluta_ref) as CNT from SDP14_RECLUTA_REF, SDP23_REFERENCIAS join SDP14_RECLUTA_REF.OI_REFERENCIA inner SDP23_REFERENCIAS.OI_REFERENCIA Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SDP14_RECLUTA_REF.oi_recluta_ref={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SDP23_REFERENCIAS.d_referencia,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SDP23_REFERENCIAS.c_referencia,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and SDP14_RECLUTA_REF.oi_reclutado={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.Reclutados.RECLUTA_OBS.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.Reclutados.RECLUTA_OBS.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SDP14_RECLUTA_OBS.oi_recluta_obs) as CNT from SDP14_RECLUTA_OBS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SDP14_RECLUTA_OBS.oi_recluta_obs={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SDP14_RECLUTA_OBS.f_observacion,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SDP14_RECLUTA_OBS.oi_recluta_obs,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and SDP14_RECLUTA_OBS.oi_reclutado={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
